$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for the harness registry (harnesses.yaml, Story 20.1-001). ABOUTME: Draft 2020-12; each entry declares command template, flags, capability flags, and an output-parser id.
title: HarnessRegistry
description: Config-driven registry of agent harnesses (claude, codex, ...) the controller can dispatch to. Generalizes the dispatch seam and the adversarial-reviewers registry into one harness abstraction.

default.description: Name of the harness used when a role/run names none. Must be a key of 'harnesses'.

harnesses.description: Map of harness name -> adapter declaration.

command.description: Command template invoked to run an agent on this harness. May use {pr_number}/{pr_url}/{story_id} placeholders, substituted before invocation. May also carry a {model} placeholder, substituted per stage from 'models' (Story 20.7-004).

models.description: Optional per-stage model map (stage name -> harness-specific model id) used to substitute the {model} placeholder in 'command' (Story 20.7-004). A 'default' key supplies the model for stages absent from the map. A command using {model} must declare a 'default'. Analogous to Epic-14's per-stage Balanced map, but with this harness's own model ids.

flags.description: Invocation flags appended verbatim to the rendered command.

parser.description: Id of the output parser used to interpret this harness's stdout (Story 20.1-002 registers parsers by id).

probe.description: Optional command run in preflight to confirm the harness CLI is installed/authenticated (Story 20.5-001). A zero exit means available; omit to skip probing (status 'unknown').

enabled.description: Whether this harness may be dispatched to. Defaults to true.

capabilities.description: Capability flags (worktree_isolation, parallel, json_contract, usage_tracking, rate_limit_aware, ...) the controller gates run modes on (Feature 20.5).
